description_long: This stool is crafted to resemble a natural tree stump, featuring a cylindrical form with a slightly flared base and a flat, circular top. The surface is rendered with wood grain patterns, including a visible spiral on the top, evoking the look of tree rings. One side of the stool is adorned with a small cluster of green, leafy foliage, adding a touch of organic detail and visual interest. The wood texture is matte and subtly varied, with darker and lighter brown tones that mimic real wood. The overall shape is geometric but softened by the naturalistic texturing and the addition of the plant detail. The stool appears sturdy and solid, suitable for outdoor or park settings.
description: A tree stump-inspired wooden stool with a flat top, wood grain texture, and a small cluster of green foliage on one side. The design is rustic and naturalistic, evoking the look of a cut log.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat, circular top with a spiral wood grain and the leafy foliage hanging over the edge.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the angled, flared base and the foliage cascading down the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain wood grain surface without foliage, emphasizing the geometric shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the angled top and a small portion of the foliage peeking over the edge.
